name: Map Chunk Bulk
desc: Sends multiple chunks at once. Used primarily for world loading.

fields.name: chunksMetadata
fields.desc: Array of (chunkX, chunkZ, bitmask) for each chunk

fields.name: skyLightSent
fields.desc: Whether sky light data is included

notes: More efficient than S21PacketChunkData for bulk loading. Used when joining a world or changing dimensions.

implementation.overview: Bulk chunk data (same as S21 but for multiple chunks). Modules: XRay.
